item.description:
## What's Changed

- Cloud detail now surfaces a “Newer version available” banner when the cloud transcript advances beyond the locally cached recording view.
- Added an inline Refresh action that drops stale transcript/job caches and reloads the latest cloud transcript.
- Kept detection metadata-only with no polling, so unchanged recordings stay visually quiet.
- Added test-only UI fixture support for the newer-version banner, clearly marked as not a feature flag.

## Validation

- `swift test` passed: 79/79 tests.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- Local stable-signed `./scripts/build-app.sh` passed.
- `codesign -dvv build/RecappiMini.app` confirmed `Authority=RecappiMini Dev`.
- Visual verification covered the forced newer-version banner state and the baseline no-banner state.

## Known Limitations / Follow-up

- Recording-list blue-dot indicators are not included in this release; that remains a follow-up phase.
- The Refresh button path should still get a quick human click-through on a naturally stale recording when one is available.
